name: Chinese-Style Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and onion soup mix, cooking until the garlic is golden.
3. Stir in the tomato puree, brown sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, and chili sauce. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Arrange the spare ribs, meaty side up, in an aluminum foil-lined baking pan or on a broiler rack. Bake for 20 minutes.
5. Brush the ribs generously with the sauce, then continue baking, brushing occasionally with remaining sauce, until the ribs are tender (about 50 more minutes).
6. Serves about 12 appetizers or 7 main dishes.
